_metadata.match: Houston Dynamo FC vs El Paso Locomotive FC
_metadata.competition: Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup — Round of 32
_metadata.notes: Rotation squad — most of these guys have thinner guide profiles. Card data below.

name_corrections.Augusto (#20): Guilherme (full name: Guilherme Augusto Vieira dos Santos)

Jimmy Maurer.kids: Four — three boys + daughter Vivi (just turned 7)
Jimmy Maurer.fun_fact: Kristen delivered their 4th child (the girl) AT HOME because they couldn't make it to the hospital. CBS Texas and MLS covered it. He said 'after three brothers, we weren't prepared for a pink blanket.'
Jimmy Maurer.background: 7 years at FC Dallas before Houston. Has an MBA and a UEFA coaching license. Bilingual (EN/ESP).
Jimmy Maurer.tea: Dad of four with a wife who literally delivered a baby at home because they ran out of time. Kristen's IG is giving Pinterest energy. The man has an MBA AND a UEFA coaching license — overachiever alert.
Jimmy Maurer.2026_stats: Backup GK. Tonight is likely his first competitive start of 2026.

Felipe Andrade.fun_fact: Won the CONMEBOL Recopa 2024 before Houston. Scored his first Dynamo goal vs Portland (Mar 14).
Felipe Andrade.tea: Having a week he'd rather forget — own goal at Colorado made it 5-2. The deflection was brutal.
Felipe Andrade.2026_stats: 1 goal (vs Portland), 1 own goal (vs Colorado), 1 yellow card

Agustin Resch.fun_fact: 6-foot-6. First Seton Hall player drafted in the MLS SuperDraft since Sacha Kljestan in 2006. BIG EAST Defensive Player of the Year.
Agustin Resch.background: Argentine, via Seton Hall University (NJ). Promoted from Dynamo 2 on March 20 after impressing on short-term call-ups.
Agustin Resch.tea: This 6'6" Argentine came through college soccer at Seton Hall and was SO good in Dynamo 2 cameos they promoted him after 3 weeks. The Pirate-to-Dynamo pipeline is real.
Agustin Resch.2026_stats: Multiple first-team appearances since March promotion

Franco Negri.partner_name: Wife (name unknown — confirmed in Dynamo signing announcement)
Franco Negri.fun_fact: Won the Supporters' Shield with Inter Miami (2024) playing alongside Messi, Busquets, and Suárez. Helped San Diego FC reach the Western Conference Final in their inaugural season (2025).
Franco Negri.background: From San Martín, Argentina. San Lorenzo → Quilmes → Independiente Rivadavia → Newell's Old Boys → Godoy Cruz → Inter Miami → San Diego → Houston.
Franco Negri.tea: Private IG, private wife, but a resume that includes playing with MESSI. The strong silent type energy is immaculate.
Franco Negri.2026_stats: First Dynamo start was vs Seattle (Apr 4). Came off at halftime for Resch.

Sam Vines.partner_note: IG handle still not found for Andrianna
Sam Vines.fun_fact: USMNT defender (9 caps, scored in 2021 Gold Cup). Won the Belgian treble at Royal Antwerp in 2023.
Sam Vines.tea: Newlywed + USMNT player. Made his Dynamo debut vs Seattle (Apr 4) — 5 minutes of stoppage time in the rain. Tonight could be his first real START.

Aliyu Ibrahim.fun_fact: Hit his 100th MLS appearance vs Seattle (Apr 4). Nigerian forward.
Aliyu Ibrahim.tea: 100 MLS caps is a quiet flex. Partner Ayshatou is in the Nigerian football social scene — attended Football Icon awards.

Agustín Bouzat.partner_bio: Physical Education teacher. Posted birthday tribute to Bouzat on Mar 28 (his 32nd).
Agustín Bouzat.fun_fact: Almost scored from midfield vs LAFC (hit the crossbar from near halfline), then got sent off in the same match.
Agustín Bouzat.tea: Fiorella moved to Houston with him from Buenos Aires. She's a phys ed teacher turned soccer wife in Texas — the culture clash content writes itself. Son Salvador is 2.

Héctor Herrera.fun_fact: Former Atlético Madrid and Porto midfielder. Mexican international. Captained the Dynamo to the 2023 US Open Cup title. This is HIS tournament.
Héctor Herrera.tea: 1.1M followers, freshly divorced, single king era, playing in the tournament he won in 2023. Conceded the penalty for Colorado's 6th goal last match. The 1.1M are watching a man seeking redemption.
Héctor Herrera.2026_stats: Mostly used as sub. Conceded penalty vs Colorado (Apr 11)

Nick Markanich.fun_fact: BACK from 2-match suspension for studs-up tackle on Portland's goalkeeper that caused visible bleeding. Got fined for refusing to leave the field.
Nick Markanich.tea: The chaos agent returns. First match back after suspension. He went studs-up on a goalkeeper, drew blood, wouldn't leave the field, got a 2-game ban AND a fine. Tonight is his redemption arc (or his next incident).
Nick Markanich.2026_stats: On loan. Red card vs Portland. 2-match ban served.

Ondřej Lingr.kids: Son (Lucie posted his first Dynamo jersey: 'Máme první dres pro Tondu⚽️')
Ondřej Lingr.fun_fact: Czech international. Came from Slavia Prague (biggest Czech club). Lucie's IG post about their son's first Dynamo jersey was wholesome content.
Ondřej Lingr.tea: Czech couple keeping it private. Lucie named their son's first Dynamo jersey moment on IG. Wholesome energy in a sea of chaos.

Guilherme.fun_fact: 100th career goal at Colorado (Apr 11). Neymar texted him saying 'you learned that from me.' Signature celebration dance: Passinho do Beloved.
Guilherme.tea: Scored his 100th career goal in a 6-2 LOSS. Main character behavior. Neymar in his DMs. 439K followers. 5G/4A in 6 matches, 3rd in MLS goal contributions.
Guilherme.2026_stats: 5 goals, 4 assists in 6 matches. 3rd in MLS for goal contributions.

bench_notable.name: Roberto 'Beto' Avila
bench_notable.note: Former Houston Dynamo player — first MLS NEXT Pro to MLS signing in Dynamo history

el_paso_starting_xi.note: Rubio Rubín NOT in the starting XI per FotMob prediction — possibly rested after baby Adriel was born April 13. Could come off the bench.

junior_gonzalez_el_paso_asst_coach.quote: I believe there are a lot of USL players who are just as good as — if not better than — some MLS players. There's something for us to prove, that we belong on the field.

ricky_ruiz_el_paso_defender.quote: We left the Open Cup with a bit of a bitter taste [from last year's Austin collapse]. That's something we're carrying into this match.

ben_olsen_houston_coach.quote: Spoke about balancing players wanting to shake off Saturday's 6-2 loss with the need to rotate and get guys minutes who haven't played much this season.

beat_writer_source.author: Dustyn Richardson
beat_writer_source.title: Reeling Houston Dynamo Turn to Open Cup for Reset Against Surging El Paso
beat_writer_source.key_insight: Houston has conceded first in EVERY game this season. El Paso has scored first in their last 6. El Paso has scored 10 first-half goals and 14 of 20 total goals on the road.
